titles.text: Tokimeki Memorial Drama Series Vol. 1: Niji-iro no Seishun

descriptions.text: Tokimeki Memorial Drama Series vol. 1: Nijiro no Seishun is a visual novel spin-off game of the original Tokimeki Memorial. Nijiiro no Seishun features Saki Nijino, who cheers the player on as they spend the game trying to make it on the school soccer team's main lineup.
